iotevents.alarmmodel.iottopicpublish.Cfn: Information required to publish the MQTT message through the AWS IoT message broker.

iotevents.alarmmodel.iottopicpublish.Mqt.Description: The MQTT topic of the message. You can use a string expression that includes variables (`$variable.`) and input values (`$input..`) as the topic string.

iotevents.alarmmodel.iottopicpublish.Pay.Description: You can configure the action payload when you publish a message to an AWS IoT Core topic.
